headline: How The Duke Energy (DUK) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Growth Hopes And Valuation Limits
summary: Duke Energy’s latest analyst update centers on an unchanged model fair value of $138.29 and an updated consensus target around $139, keeping the stock’s implied value closely aligned with prior work. That tight range reflects research where some firms have lifted targets while others have cut by $1 to $11 and, in several cases, shifted to more neutral ratings as they weigh strong growth themes against the roughly 15% share move since early December. As you read on, you will see how to track...

headline: How The PTC Therapeutics (PTCT) Story Is Shifting With Sephience And DMD Uncertainty
summary: Analysts recently trimmed their fair value estimate for PTC Therapeutics from US$87.93 to US$86.50, a modest 1.6% cut that captures a slightly more cautious stance. This shift sits alongside a wide mix of analyst ratings, with fresh price targets clustered between US$82 and US$120 as views on Sephience, the DMD franchise and execution risk continue to evolve. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces fit together and what to watch as the narrative around PTC Therapeutics...

headline: Chinese Bonds Near Inflection Point as Inflation Outlook Shifts
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Chinese bonds may be reaching a historical turning point, with yields set to climb from record low levels as deflationary pressures ease and expectations for monetary loosening recede.The benchmark 10-year yield has the potential to finally break out of its recent narrow trading range and rise toward 2% or even higher this year from around 1.8% now, some analysts say.
